purpose: Replace with line_trace_swd_tune_plan.py dry-run or real --run JSON output.
hardware_gate: Before real --run, confirm target UID, raw DAP/status, fresh firmware, motor safe state, and RUNNING_TUNE_SAFE route.
expected_real_evidence: SWD write plan uses g_line_tuning_block from fresh ELF
safe kp/kd/base_speed/max_correction changes read back as APPLIED
bad kp is rejected with BAD_CONTROL_PARAM
cold parameter change while RUNNING_TUNE_SAFE is rolled back with DANGEROUS_JUMP
telemetry or bench snapshot records safety_state and error_code
